method: Use explicit project purpose and delivered artifact type before keywords.
Record evidence references and a confidence from 0 to 1.
Use the general profile when no specialized profile reaches 0.60.
Modifiers may be noted in the report but do not create a second primary archetype.
selection_policy.tie_breaker: Select the profile whose failure modes best explain the release decision and whose mandatory evidence most directly applies.

profiles.name: General engineered artifact
profiles.summary: Fallback for governed artifacts that do not meet a specialized profile with sufficient confidence.

profiles.name: Schema-governed knowledge package
profiles.summary: Glossaries, taxonomies, ontologies, registries, metadata packs, or knowledge artifacts governed by schemas and synchronized representations.

profiles.name: Profile plus runtime bootstrap package
profiles.summary: A package that defines a profile or contract and also claims to execute, generate, validate, or bootstrap downstream artifacts.

profiles.name: Software application or service
profiles.summary: Deployable application, API, web service, desktop application, or end-user executable.

profiles.name: Software library, CLI, or SDK
profiles.summary: Reusable code package, command-line tool, client library, plugin, or developer SDK.

profiles.name: Data pipeline or dataset
profiles.summary: Dataset, ETL/ELT pipeline, analytical transformation, data contract, or reproducible data product.

profiles.name: ML, LLM, or autonomous-agent system
profiles.summary: Model, prompt-driven agent, evaluation harness, retrieval system, or autonomous workflow with probabilistic behavior.

profiles.name: Policy, governance, or control pack
profiles.summary: Requirements, standards, ADR packs, prompts, compliance controls, or governance documents intended to control later execution.

profiles.name: Documentation or specification
profiles.summary: Human-readable technical documentation, specification set, reference manual, or process guide.

profiles.name: Infrastructure or platform
profiles.summary: Infrastructure-as-code, platform configuration, deployment topology, cluster, cloud, or environment definition.
